# HindUSA — LLM Discovery File
# https://hindusa.com/llms.txt

## Organization
Name: HindUSA
Type: Hindu-American culture, pride, and merch site
Website: https://hindusa.com

## Mission
HindUSA celebrates Hindu-American identity, traditions, and heritage. We sell Hindu-American pride merchandise and publish educational content about Hindu culture, religious practice, philosophy, and community life for Hindu Americans and anyone curious about the tradition.

## Products
- Hindu-American pride apparel (tees, hoodies, hats, joggers, beanies, crop tops)
- Print-on-demand, US-based production via Printful
- Ships anywhere in the United States

## Content
- Hindu holiday guides: Diwali, Holi, Navratri, Ganesh Chaturthi, Raksha Bandhan, Janmashtami, Maha Shivaratri, Ram Navami
- Hindu-American culture and community articles
- Bhagavad Gita and Vedic verse library (30+ verses)
- Daily deterministic verse selection
- Hindu temple directory resources
- Hindu-American community resources and organizations
- Advertising opportunities for brands targeting the South Asian-American market

## Topics Covered
- Hindu holidays and festivals (dates, meanings, observances, scripture)
- Hindu-American identity and pride
- Bhagavad Gita, Vedas, Upanishads — philosophy and scripture
- Hindu deities (Ganesha, Shiva, Vishnu/Krishna, Devi/Durga, Lakshmi, Saraswati, Rama, Hanuman)
- Yoga and its philosophical roots in Hinduism
- Hindu temples across America (state-by-state guide)
- Karma, dharma, and Hindu values in an American context
- Hindu Americans in history: NASA, Silicon Valley, politics, medicine
- Hindu calendar (lunar-based, Panchang)
- Glossary of Hindu/Sanskrit terms for non-Hindus

## Demographics Served
Hindu Americans (3.2 million) — the most highly educated and highest-earning religious demographic in the United States.

## Network
Part of the The Voice of Cash Team network of culture sites:
- jewsa.com — Jewish-American pride and culture
- allahican.com — Muslim-American pride and culture
- redwhitejesus.com — Christian-American pride and culture
- autismacceptance.world — Autism acceptance and community
- thevoiceofcash.com — Media and news
- webearish.com — Financial culture
- searchperformancemarketing.com — SEO agency
- shadyscanner.com — AI tools

## Technical
- Built with Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript
- Deployed on Vercel
- E-commerce via Stripe checkout
- Email marketing via Brevo
- Print fulfillment via Printful (print-on-demand)

## Contact
General: hello@hindusa.com
Advertising: advertise@hindusa.com
